isGeolocationRequired() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Whether entrants must provide geolocation when joining.
isRegistrationOpen() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Whether the current time falls within the registration window.
isRegistrationOpen_whenWindowAlreadyEnded_returnsFalse() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventTest
When end time is in the past, registration must be closed (no joining).
isRegistrationOpen_whenWindowIncludesFuture_returnsTrue() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventTest
Registration is open when current time lies inside [start, end]; max window => always open.
